note: Each Wave C plan (44-07..44-13) removes its prefix group from this list as it lands. Final state: empty array, except for groups with a documented deferral reason below.

TC-NEG.rationale: TC-NEG-* IDs from ARCHITECTURE §15.14/§15.21 are negative-space assertions (things that must NOT exist: no task_id column, no counter-propose endpoint, etc.), not behavioral flow tests. Several are already implicitly covered by existing invariants: TC-DB-005/009 static schema checks cover TC-NEG-003-class schema forbiddings; TC-INV-002/003 cross-cutting invariants cover wire-format and taxonomy forbiddings. A dedicated TC-NEG-*-labelled static audit pass has not been written — phase budget prioritized positive behavioral TCs and real security bugs surfaced in 44-05.
TC-NEG.followUp: Fold TC-NEG-* dedicated labeling into a follow-up hardening pass, or pin TC-NEG-* labels to the existing covering invariants during the next test-contract hygiene sweep. Mitigating coverage is already in place — this is a labeling/traceability gap, not a coverage gap.
